vsi-vector-profiles.vsi-vector-profile:
${vector\-of\-data\-name}
${interface\-usage}
<#if l2cp\-pass?has_content>
<#if l2cp\-pass==true> l2cp-pass-00-02to0f-10-2x <#else> block-l2cp </#if>
</#if> <#if dhcpv4\-profile\-name?has_content>
true false ${dhcpv4\-profile\-name} <#if dhcpv4\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side?has_content> ${dhcpv4\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side} </#if>
</#if> <#if dhcpv6\-profile\-name?has_content>
true false ${dhcpv6\-profile\-name} <#if dhcpv6\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side?has_content> ${dhcpv6\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side} </#if>
</#if> <#if pppoe\-profile\-name?has_content>
true ${pppoe\-profile\-name} <#if pppoe\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side?has_content> ${pppoe\-allow\-server\-at\-user\-side} </#if>
</#if> <#if icmpv6\-profile\-name?has_content>
true true ${icmpv6\-profile\-name}
</#if> <#if ipv4\-antispoofing?has_content>
${ipv4\-antispoofing} <#if ipv4\-antispoofing && learn\-ip\-from\-dhcpv4?has_content && learn\-ip\-from\-dhcpv4>
</#if> <#if ipv4\-antispoofing?has_content && max\-anti\-ip\-address?has_content> ${max\-anti\-ip\-address} </#if>
</#if> <#if ipv6\-antispoofing?has_content>
${ipv6\-antispoofing} <#if ipv6\-antispoofing && learn\-ip\-from\-dhcpv6?has_content && learn\-ip\-from\-dhcpv6>
</#if> <#if ipv6\-antispoofing?has_content && max\-anti\-ip\-address?has_content> ${max\-anti\-ip\-address} </#if>
</#if>
